'''鈭歽-l-y-m''' ('''kayalyemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vowelize|vowelize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-l-y-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vowelize|vowelize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-l-y-m
|-
! Lemma
| kayalyemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyalyemoko|thiyalyemoko]] || [[word:jiyalyemoko|jiyalyemoko]] || [[word:shiyalyemoko|shiyalyemoko]] || [[word:kiyalyemoko|kiyalyemoko]]
|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
